extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando won the 229km Stage 12 sprint after teammates delivered him perfectly positioned into final kilometer
tactical_patterns: FRAILE Omar attacked at KOM summit to secure points despite being in breakaway, showing jersey defense trumps stage win
ZHUPA Eugert attacked solo at flamme rouge compression point exploiting bunch disorganization, caught but revealed late-race chaos vulnerability
Quick-Step delivered GAVIRIA perfectly through technical double curve under flamme rouge while rivals like UAE and Bora lost positioning

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: dominated 229km sprint showing superior condition after longest stage, strengthening maglia ciclamino position
rider_signals.MEZGEC Luka: positive: second place shows Wilier still competitive in sprints despite team's negative press coverage during race
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: third place adequate but Quick-Step's technical lead-out through curves under flamme rouge exposed tactical gap
rider_signals.FRAILE Omar: positive: tactically aware to take KOM points from breakaway, now three points ahead in mountains classification
rider_signals.FERRARI Roberto: neutral: UAE tried positioning through flamme rouge curves but lost GAVIRIA's wheel at critical compression moment
